headline: Gabriel Attal wants to reinvent Macronism
description: According to his critics, the 37-year-old former prime minister embodies a form of opportunism. While he places himself in the steps of Emmanuel Macron's liberalism, he has set himself apart by making state authority a cornerstone of his politics.

headline: Raphaël Glucksmann draws crowd at rally and takes aim at far right
For Trump's 80th birthday, Dana White brings mixed martial arts to the White House
'The AI war has begun': France and Europe worried as US blocks Anthropic's latest AI model
description: The American start-up has disabled its latest AI model, Mythos 5, at the request of Washington. From a European perspective, the decision is seen as evidence of US dominance in the sector and the Trump administration's desire for control.

headline: The Knicks, the soul of New York, are NBA champions after more than half a century of waiting
description: After a long period of anticipation and frustration, New York, where basketball is so much more than just a sport, finally celebrates, following its 94-90 triumph on Saturday in Game 5 of the NBA Finals against Victor Wembanyama's Spurs.

headline: Madrid is kicking! Le Monde's picks of restaurants, bars, galleries and boutiques
description: Pedro Almodóvar's city keeps reinventing itself. In a joyful blend of classical architecture and ambitious urban projects, century-old shops, delightful restaurants and trendy hotspots line the streets, not to mention art venues that go far beyond the splendors of the Prado. 'Vamos!'

headline: At Dior, Jonathan Anderson is thinking long-term, not 'trendy'
description: One year after this arrival at Dior, the 41-year-old Northern Irish designer is still going at full throttle, releasing collections for Uniqlo and his own brand JW Anderson in addition to his 10 for the luxury label. His goal, he says, is to 'transform' the brand.

France prepares for another 'very intense and widespread' heat event, possibly over 40°C
description: The southern half of France is set to be hit first this weekend. Starting Tuesday, the heat is expected to worsen and move northward. Temperatures could reach or exceed 40°C, although some uncertainty remains.

headline: The RN's fascination with LFI's presidential election 'war machine'
description: Despite their political opposition, Marine Le Pen and senior figures in the far-right Rassemblement National party often praise the organization of the radical left LFI, particularly its ability to stay on message.

headline: The Algerians who seek peaceful relations with France: 'For my children, I want us to reconcile and move on'
description: 'Algeria's unhealed war memories' (2/3). The trauma of independence remains deeply rooted in Algeria, affecting both pro-independence fighters and French conscripts. This fuels demands for recognition of colonial crimes and formal apologies, not just 'transactional diplomacy.'

headline: The boycott of Nadav Lapid: An unacceptable essentialism
